problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: If Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site is applied to spread, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
